hypothesis: On XAUUSD M5, the Asia session (00:00-06:00 UTC) forms a compression range that expands directionally at London open (07:00-10:00 UTC); a confirmed displacement breakout beyond the Asia range by >=0.5*ATR captures the liquidity-driven expansion leg.

regime_filter.rationale: Reject dead days and extreme-news days; Asia range breakouts need moderate volatility to have follow-through without getting chopped.

entry.long: close > AsiaHigh + 0.5*ATR14 AND body >= 1.0*ATR14 AND bar_of_london <= 24 AND no_prior_breakout_today AND regime_on
entry.short: close < AsiaLow - 0.5*ATR14 AND body >= 1.0*ATR14 AND bar_of_london <= 24 AND no_prior_breakout_today AND regime_on

exit.sl: opposite side of Asia range - 0.2*ATR14 (structural stop)
exit.trailing: move SL to breakeven at +1R, then trail 2*ATR14
